'''Gida Luroon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who had a purple skin tone and bore a scar across her left eye. She worked as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] some time during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==

At some point while on Ord Mantell, Luroon was preparing to go off-world when she intercepted a transmission concerning [[Renci Tosh]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] female who had just escaped from some local thugs. Unaware of Renci's connection to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]], Luroon attempted to track down and capture her alive for the offered reward - which, she assumed, would increase if she brought in anyone else assisting her quarry's escape.<ref name="CG1" />
